description_long: This is a rectangular, military-style toolbox constructed primarily from dark green, weathered wood with reinforced metal corners and edges. The box features two robust folding metal handles on the shorter ends, designed for easy carrying. The top is secured with two prominent metal latches, and the front face displays faded stenciled text reading 'THE PROPERTY OF THE CORPORATION.' The surface shows signs of wear, scratches, and scuffs, suggesting frequent use in rugged environments. The box sits on small wooden feet, elevating it slightly above the ground, and the overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for heavy-duty urban or industrial settings.
description: A rugged, dark green wooden toolbox with metal reinforcements, folding handles, and faded stenciled text on the front. It features heavy-duty latches and a weathered, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: End view showing a single folding metal handle centered on a reinforced metal plate.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two metal latches and faded stenciled text, with the main access panel visible.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, identical to view 0, with a single folding metal handle on a reinforced plate.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain wooden panel with metal corner reinforcements and no handles or text.
attribute_handle_type: Folding rectangular steel handles mounted on each short end, designed for carrying; no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-facing steel clasp latches, likely requiring manual release; no keyholes or combination locks visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied; no visible trays, drawers, or dividers on the exterior.
attribute_external_labeling: 'THE PROPERTY OF THE CORPORATION' stenciled in faded paint on the front panel.
